title: Protect local budget data
description: Keep plan, position, and idempotency data inside the trusted owner-controlled local boundary.
target: Zero budget or actual payload disclosures in process arguments, ordinary logs, stderr, telemetry, crash diagnostics, Git, or shared temporary files; 100% of persisted BUDGET directories and files use owner-only access such as 0700 and 0600 where supported; explicit structured data-return operations are the only payload output.
load_condition: Success, validation failure, compatibility failure, storage failure, crash recovery, replay, history, and position workflows.
measurement: Permission, log-capture, process-inspection, crash, repository-status, and temporary-artifact tests scan every non-data-return surface for seeded canary values.
rationale: Monthly targets and actual positions are sensitive financial data even in a single-user local product.
